---
title: error-strings
description: "Use lower-case unpunctuated error messages."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Use lower-case unpunctuated error messages. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
errors.New("Connection refused.")
```

## Good

```go
errors.New("connection refused")
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only error-strings`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
